ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_snippets" (
  "snippet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the code snippet (e.g., CS1, CS2) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the code snippet */,
  "variable" TEXT /* Variable associated with the code snippet */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of the code snippet */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class to which the method belongs */,
  "package" TEXT /* Package where the class is located */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the code snippet */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file containing the code snippet */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the project the snippet belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the code snippet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the code snippet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the code snippet was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the code snippet */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the code snippet (e.g., active, deprecated, reviewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snippet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_snippets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "snippet_id" TEXT /* Reference to the code snippet it belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the method does */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the package the method belongs to */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the class the method belongs to */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the method */,
  "is_static" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is static */,
  "is_abstract" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is abstract */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_snippet_id FOREIGN KEY ("snippet_id") REFERENCES code_snippets ("snippet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package purpose */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the project the package belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package was last updated */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "snippet_id" TEXT /* Reference to the code snippet it contains */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the project the file belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "hash" TEXT /* Unique hash of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_snippet_id FOREIGN KEY ("snippet_id") REFERENCES code_snippets ("snippet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the package the class belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "is_abstract" INTEGER /* Indicates if the class is abstract */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the review */,
  "snippet_id" TEXT /* Reference to the code snippet being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_snippet_id FOREIGN KEY ("snippet_id") REFERENCES code_snippets ("snippet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the test */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the file containing the test */,
  "test_case" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the test was run */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test run in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)
